data.content: Implemented on branch foolery-6dbc-style. Refactored src/stores/__tests__/terminal-store-extended.test.ts into smaller describe blocks to clear max-lines-per-function, wrapped long test fixtures in src/hooks/__tests__/use-scope-refinement-notifications.test.ts, and made intentionally unused mock backend params explicit in src/lib/__tests__/mock-backend-port.ts. Validation: ./node_modules/.bin/eslint src/stores/__tests__/terminal-store-extended.test.ts src/hooks/__tests__/use-scope-refinement-notifications.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/mock-backend-port.ts; bun test src/stores/__tests__/terminal-store-extended.test.ts src/hooks/__tests__/use-scope-refinement-notifications.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/mock-backend-port.ts; bun run test; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run build. Commit: 83d42f5746cb.
